selected_next_step.name: truth_validation_response_action_level_scorer_v1
selected_next_step.reason: The replay source-row reproducibility layer now validates across allowed days and distinct conditions. The immediate gap is not another source lookup, but a scorer that turns truth_validation_response_v1 outputs into an auditable quality score and names residual/FIFO/close gaps before more complex verifier work.
input_contract: optional candidate_registry/state_machine_results.duckdb for selected action joins only
optional residual_lots table for selected action residual coverage joins only
required_metrics: official fee formula delta versus selected_actions expected_official_taker_fee when present
residual_lots coverage by selected action when residual_lots is provided
strict_rescue_close coverage and missing-close-field list when close rows are absent or incomplete

decision_rules.KEEP: source ref completeness for market/L1/L2 is 100%, fee_rate_source coverage is 100%, private/deployable/promotion guards are false, and missing FIFO/close fields are explicitly named without claiming promotion evidence
decision_rules.UNKNOWN: required scorer inputs or selected-action joins are missing; name exact missing files/columns
decision_rules.DISCARD: scorer would require replay_store_v2 broad strategy search, hard-code fee rates, claim external private truth, or upgrade promotion from source-truth-only evidence

deferred_option.name: residual_fifo_plus_strict_rescue_close_verifier
deferred_option.reason_deferred: Residual lot fields are present, but strict rescue close validation cannot be honestly implemented until selected close action ids, close timing, close side/qty/cost, fee source, and close source refs are available or explicitly modeled in a selected action request.
deferred_option.allowed_future_scope: After the scorer names residual/FIFO/close coverage gaps, implement a selected-action-only residual FIFO verifier. Do not start from replay_store_v2 as broad strategy search.

research_ranking.label: KEEP_REPLAY_STORE_V2_ACTION_LEVEL_SCORER_PLAN_SELECTED
research_ranking.interpretation: A concrete local action-level scorer is selected to grade replay-derived truth_validation_response_v1 outputs. This remains research-only tooling.

next_action: Implement a local no-network truth_validation_response_action_level_scorer_v1 and smoke it against the existing single-day and multi-day response artifacts; keep all private/deployable/promotion guards false.
